query:
SELECT 
  p.id, p.projectName, p.priority, p.sector, p.state, p.stageCode,
  p.estimatedValue, p.lane,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN c.sendReady = 1 THEN 1 END) AS sendReadyContacts,
  MAX(c.name) AS topContact,
  MAX(c.title) AS topContactTitle,
  p.createdAt,
  p.updatedAt
FROM projects p
LEFT JOIN contacts c ON c.projectId = p.id AND c.sendReady = 1
JOIN userProfiles up ON (
  (up.territories LIKE '%WA%' OR up.territories LIKE '%OFFSHORE_AU%')
  AND up.userId = 2340043
)
WHERE p.suppressed = 0
  AND p.priority IN ('hot', 'warm')
  AND p.lane NOT IN ('bess', 'pal', 'pumps')
  AND (p.state IN ('WA') OR p.state IS NULL OR p.state = 'NATIONAL')
GROUP BY p.id
HAVING sendReadyContacts >= 1
ORDER BY 
  CASE p.priority WHEN 'hot' THEN 1 WHEN 'warm' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END,
  sendReadyContacts DESC,
  p.estimatedValue DESC
LIMIT 10;
